messages.content:
请帮我改写一下下面这段话，使其变得礼貌且清晰：Hi Miya,

I'm <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, an undergraduate student in Nanjing University, China. I have been accepted as an exchange student to Prof. Weichen Liu's lab at NTU. 

I would greatly appreciate it if you could kindly provide me with the necessary documents and guide me through the procedure. 

Thank you in advance for your time and help.

Best Regards
Ji

尊敬的Miya，

我是中国南京大学的本科生季宇豪。我已被接受为国立台湾大学刘伟晨教授实验室的交换生。

若您能友善地提供我所需的文件并指导我完成相关手续，我将非常感激。

在此提前感谢您的时间和帮助。

祝好
季宇豪

请帮我改写一下下面这段话，使其变成礼貌且清晰的美式英语：Hi Miya,

I’m <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, an undergraduate student in Nanjing University, China. I have been accepted as an exchange student to Prof. Weichen Liu’s lab at NTU.

I would greatly appreciate it if you could kindly provide me with the necessary documents and guide me through the procedure.

Thank you in advance for your time and help.

Best Regards
Ji

Dear Miya,

I hope this email finds you well. My name is <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, and I am currently an undergraduate student at Nanjing University in China. I am thrilled to inform you that I have been accepted as an exchange student in Prof. Weichen Liu's lab at NTU.

I would be immensely grateful if you could kindly assist me in obtaining the required documents and guiding me through the necessary procedures. Your help in this matter would be deeply appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your valuable time and support.

Best regards,
Ji

Please help me combine the two sentences below, accurate and brief while maintaining the logic: \Rone{Binary Transformers are promising in edge deployment application due to its small parameter size and high computation efficiency.}
\Rone{Existing works have achieved binarization for transformer-based model parameters and activations while maintaining a considerable accuracy.}

Binary Transformers have shown promise in edge deployment applications, thanks to their small parameter size and high computation efficiency, with existing works successfully achieving binarization for both transformer-based model parameters and activations while maintaining considerable accuracy.

请帮我把以下句子改写成地道的美式英语：Is it possible that I still apply the exchange project in the name of a PhD student of CUHK? I have much trouble and little time to complete all the items of the information for undergraduate students.

Is it possible for me to apply for the exchange project under the name of a PhD student at CUHK? I am facing numerous challenges and have limited time to complete all the requirements specified for undergraduate students.
请帮我把以下中文翻译成地道且礼貌的美式英语：您好，我有几个问题想咨询一下：1.我是否可能只在NTU访问两个月呢？如果可以，应该如何收取费用
Hello, I have a few questions that I would like to inquire about: 1. Is it possible for me to visit NTU for only two months? If so, how would the fees be charged?

以下是research objective:Build an automatic assertion generation system for RTL-level code like verilog based on artificial rules using Large Language Model. 
The rules include hardware specification (like RISCV specification), natural language (like expert knowledge ) and etc..
,请你根据此写一段英文的DESCRIPTION OF THE RESEARCH

DESCRIPTION OF THE RESEARCH:

The objective of this research is to develop an automatic assertion generation system for RTL-level code, such as Verilog, leveraging artificial rules and utilizing a Large Language Model. The system aims to incorporate various types of rules, including hardware specifications like the RISCV specification, natural language rules derived from expert knowledge, and more. By leveraging the capabilities of the Large Language Model, the system will generate assertions automatically, enabling efficient and accurate verification of RTL-level code. The developed system will contribute to enhancing the reliability and correctness of RTL-level designs, ultimately improving the overall quality of hardware systems.

请帮我把以下中文翻译成学术的美式英语research description：1.	开始第一周的文献调研以及代码复现，做一份PPT分享，总结现有的工作，思考值得深入挖掘的创新点以及可能的实现方案
2.	制定完善的进度规划并严格执行
3.	定期参加组会和教授讨论项目进展
4.	尽快搭建一个demo，不断完善设计

Research Description:
 
1. The first week will be dedicated to conducting a comprehensive literature review and replicating existing code. The findings and outcomes of this research will be summarized and presented through a PowerPoint presentation. This initial phase will involve analyzing the current state of the field, identifying potential areas for further exploration, and outlining possible implementation strategies.

2. A rigorous and well-defined timeline will be established to ensure effective project management. Adhering to this schedule will be of utmost importance throughout the research process.

3. Active participation in group meetings and engaging in discussions with the professor will be crucial for monitoring and evaluating the progress of the project. Regular updates and feedback exchanges will contribute to refining the research objectives and methodologies.

4. It is essential to swiftly establish a working demo and continuously enhance its design. Prompt efforts will be made to develop a prototype that demonstrates the concept effectively, allowing for iterative improvements and optimizations.
请帮我把以下中文翻译成地道且礼貌的美式英语：您好，我有几个问题想咨询一下：1.我是否可能只在NTU访问两个月呢？如果可以，应该如何收取费用 2.学校不提供funding support，所以不用提交Funding support letter from the home University (in English) 3. Application Summary是指上一封邮件最后的表格吗？

Hello,

I have a few questions that I would like to inquire about:

1. Is it possible for me to visit NTU for only two months? If so, could you please provide information on the fee structure for this duration?

2. As the university does not offer funding support, am I not required to submit a Funding Support Letter from my home university?

3. Does the term "Application Summary" refer to the form attached in my previous email?

Thank you for your attention and assistance.

Best regards, [Your Name]

Transformer-based neural networks are widely utilized in various fields, including natural language processing (NLP), computer vision (CV), and speech recognition due to their exceptional performance. These models have also gained attention for their deployment on edge devices, like smartphones and embedded systems. This enables real-time execution of tasks such as voice recognition, text translation, and smart assistant functionalities. This approach offers benefits such as reduced communication time, improved response speed, lower latency, as well as enhanced privacy and security.
